channel.title: 888 Technology Studio - 技术创新与数字化转型
channel.description: 专注于技术创新和数字化转型领域，分享现代 Web 应用开发、系统设计和开源贡献的实践经验。

item.title: 智选好物必备 - 高性价比产品推荐清单
item.description: 精选 3C 数码产品，从手机到配件，全方位满足你的科技需求。支持按平台筛选、价格排序。
item.author: address@yoursite.com (888)
item.category: 数码，电子产品，好物推荐

item.title: 淘宝热门威士忌和伏特加洋酒推荐 2026
item.description: 2026 年淘宝最值得购买的威士忌和伏特加排行榜！精选单一麦芽威士忌、调和威士忌、进口伏特加等优质洋酒，使用专属链接购买享受额外优惠，还能获得佣金返利。
item.author: address@yoursite.com (888)
item.category: 淘宝联盟，洋酒推荐，威士忌，伏特加

item.title: 淘宝联盟 2026 热门酒水推荐排行榜
item.description: 2026 年最值得购买的热门酒水排行榜！精选白酒、红酒、啤酒等优质产品，使用专属链接购买享受额外优惠，还能获得佣金返利。
item.author: address@yoursite.com (888)
item.category: 淘宝联盟，酒水推荐，白酒，红酒，啤酒

item.title: 淘宝京东联盟自动推荐系统实战
item.description: 完整实现淘宝京东联盟商品自动获取、转链和展示的 React 组件系统
item.author: address@yoursite.com (888)
item.category: 淘宝联盟，京东联盟，电商，自动化

item.title: 淘口令自动复制功能演示
item.description: 演示在微信环境中自动复制淘口令并弹出提示的 React 组件
item.author: address@yoursite.com (888)
item.category: 淘宝，淘口令，微信，自动化

item.title: Middleware 跳转测试页面
item.description: 用于测试 Next.js Middleware 的极速跳转功能
item.author: address@yoursite.com (888)

item.title: 2024 年双 11 购物攻略 - 淘宝京东必买好物推荐
item.description: 双 11 购物节来了！精选淘宝和京东超值好物，使用专属链接享受额外优惠，还能获得佣金返利。
item.author: address@yoursite.com (888)

item.title: Release of Tailwind Nextjs Starter Blog v2.0
item.description: Release of Tailwind Nextjs Starter Blog template v2.0, refactored with Nextjs App directory and React Server Components setup.Discover the new features and how to migrate from V1.
item.author: address@yoursite.com (888)

item.title: New features in v1
item.description: An overview of the new features released in v1 - code block copy, multiple authors, frontmatter layout and more
item.author: address@yoursite.com (888)

item.title: Introducing Multi-part Posts with Nested Routing
item.description: The blog template supports posts in nested sub-folders. This can be used to group posts of similar content e.g. a multi-part course. This post is itself an example of a nested route!
item.author: address@yoursite.com (888)

item.title: Introducing Tailwind Nextjs Starter Blog
item.description: Looking for a performant, out of the box template, with all the best in web technology to support your blogging needs? Checkout the Tailwind Nextjs Starter Blog template.
item.author: address@yoursite.com (888)

item.title: Deriving the OLS Estimator
item.description: How to derive the OLS Estimator with matrix notation and a tour of math typesetting using markdown with the help of KaTeX.
item.author: address@yoursite.com (888)

item.title: Images in Next.js
item.description: In this article we introduce adding images in the tailwind starter blog and the benefits and limitations of the next/image component.
item.author: address@yoursite.com (888)

item.title: Markdown Guide
item.description: Markdown cheatsheet for all your blogging needs - headers, lists, images, tables and more! An illustrated guide based on GitHub Flavored Markdown.
item.author: address@yoursite.com (888)

item.title: The Time Machine
item.description: The Time Traveller (for so it will be convenient to speak of him) was expounding a recondite matter to us. His pale grey eyes shone and twinkled, and his usually pale face was flushed and animated...
item.author: address@yoursite.com (888)

item.title: O Canada
item.description: The scenic lands of Canada featuring maple leaves, snow-capped mountains, turquoise lakes and Toronto. Take in the sights in this photo gallery exhibition and see how easy it is to replicate with some MDX magic and tailwind classes.
item.author: address@yoursite.com (888)

item.title: Sample .md file
item.description: Example of a markdown file with code blocks and syntax highlighting
item.author: address@yoursite.com (888)
